subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! The Creator of heaven maketh mention of thee from this Most Exalted Station and this Uttermost Goal, that thou mayest rejoice and be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا یذکرک فاطر السماء من هذا المقام الاسنی و المقصد الاقصی لتفرح و تکون من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
